summary: Very good show overall despite criticism of the guest accordionist; recording quality not discussed
review: The reviewer rates the concert as a very good performance, though they are frustrated by the guest accordion player’s aggressive and out‑of‑place playing that detracts from what could have been a beautiful breakdown palace. No comments were made about the audio source or its fidelity.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review, giving 4 stars and praising the show while noting a specific performance issue; no recording details provided, so rating is based mainly on show quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments regarding sound clarity, mix, or source type.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally positive impression of the set despite the guest musician’s intrusive accordion parts.
